evals.prompt: Perform a TRIZ analysis on the src/services directory to identify technical contradictions in the current architecture.
evals.expected_output: Analysis document in analysis/ directory with identified contradictions mapped to TRIZ principles
assertions: Each contradiction mapped to at least one TRIZ principle number

evals.prompt: Run a contradiction audit on our CI/CD pipeline workflow in .github/workflows/
evals.expected_output: TRIZ audit report identifying trade-offs in the pipeline
assertions: Identifies contradiction: Improving X causes Y to worsen
References at least one TRIZ principle from references/principles.md

evals.prompt: I need to audit the IndexedDB schema in src/services/db.ts for performance vs maintainability trade-offs using TRIZ methodology.
evals.expected_output: TRIZ analysis report with specific contradictions and resolutions
assertions: Contradiction explicitly stated in format: Improving X vs Worsening Y

evals.prompt: Analyze the error handling system for the contradiction between security (strong validation) vs usability (developer experience). Use TRIZ.
evals.expected_output: Analysis identifying security vs usability contradiction with TRIZ resolution
assertions: Identifies contradiction type as Technical or Physical

evals.prompt: Audit the authentication flow in src/auth/ for token storage security vs offline functionality trade-offs.
evals.expected_output: TRIZ audit document with security vs offline contradiction analysis
assertions: At least one resolution strategy proposed
